title: I just had an epiphany
wikitext:
[]: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Wed Dec 12, 2012 7:03 pm Hideo Kojima should make an Evangelion game. And Hideaki Anno should make an MGS anime.

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed Dec 12, 2012 7:22 pm Yaywalter wrote: Hideo Kojima should make an Evangelion game. And Hideaki Anno should make an MGS anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Dec 12, 2012 7:25 pm I've always wondered if Kojima was Eva fan. The mad wacky meta stuff he tries to pull in MGS2 is awfully Evaesque

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Dec 12, 2012 8:07 pm That would be hilarious, especially the speculation revolving around this and how they think it could be a Kojima game in disguise.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Wed Dec 12, 2012 8:15 pm Nanomachines everywhere up in this bitch.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Wed Dec 12, 2012 8:24 pm Minds would be screwed.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Wed Dec 12, 2012 9:14 pm ARRRGGH SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 13, 2012 1:32 am Justacrazyguy wrote: No! Bad ideia, those two universes should never join each other. There is a line that can´t be crossed!

[]:             Quote Post by GetOvaDaBridge » Thu Dec 13, 2012 2:40 am Xard wrote: I've always wondered if Kojima was Eva fan. The mad wacky meta stuff he tries to pull in MGS2 is awfully Evaesque

[]:             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Thu Dec 13, 2012 2:49 am On the subject of other people doing their own takes on Eva, I want to see Michael Bay take on Evangelion. Not only would it be funny/interesting seeing how it turns out, it would be even more funny watching the fans lose their s..t.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Thu Dec 13, 2012 2:52 am Ringworm128 wrote: On the subject of other people doing their own takes on Eva, I want to see Michael Bay take on Evangelion. Not only would it be funny/interesting seeing how it turns out, it would be even more funny watching the fans lose their s..t.

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Thu Dec 13, 2012 3:04 pm Sachi wrote: I don't believe the OP suggest a crossover as much as he simply suggests that the two franchises cross mediums; Anno would write/direct a MGS anime, and the same for Kojima with an Eva video game. The point being that these two creative minds adapt the others work into their own respective art form. Perhaps not a bad idea if the two ever came together to collaborate in this way.

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Thu Dec 13, 2012 3:30 pm Yaywalter wrote: And well, I'm sure Anno's take on MGS would be... interesting .

[]:             Quote Post by Nyanlathotep » Thu Dec 13, 2012 4:45 pm Xard wrote: I've always wondered if Kojima was Eva fan. The mad wacky meta stuff he tries to pull in MGS2 is awfully Evaesque

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Thu Dec 13, 2012 5:31 pm I'll just leave this here...

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Dec 14, 2012 2:10 pm Yaywalter wrote: Also, going off of Zone of the Enders, Kojima seems to be an Eva fan. That and the fact that he seems to want to do something besides MGS (even though he never escapes it) leads me to believe that he'd be interested in doing something like an Eva game. And well, I'm sure Anno's take on MGS would be... interesting .

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Tankred » Fri Dec 14, 2012 3:06 pm Xard wrote: Someone has been reading naughty comics!

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Dec 14, 2012 3:17 pm If not obvious by his work, his twitter pictures speak for themselves whether he likes Eva. Xard wrote: Didn't Kojima post a pic of his Gunbuster box or something to twitter once? Or maybe I'm misremembering things...

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Dec 14, 2012 4:04 pm Fireball wrote: If not obvious by his work, his twitter pictures speak for themselves whether he likes Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Dec 14, 2012 5:58 pm CJD wrote: I think it's physically impossible for Kojima to be any more likable. Maybe if he spends his free time saving puppies from trees or something.
summary:
[]: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Wed Dec 12, 2012 7:03 pm Hideo Kojima should make an Evangelion game. And Hideaki Anno should make an MGS anime.

[]: Re: I just had an epiphany.             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed Dec 12, 2012 7:22 pm Yaywalter wrote: Hideo Kojima should make an Evangelion game. And Hideaki Anno should make an MGS anime.
